summary: Antral follicle count (AFC) directly measures ovarian reserve and predicts ovarian response during IVF more accurately than age or FSH by providing precise data on how well ovaries will respond to stimulation. It outperforms both age and FSH in terms of predictive value for treatment-specific outcomes due to its real-time insight into follicular quantity.
